visual_description: Two men in light-colored shirts sit at desks with laptops and headphones, one looking at a phone while the other works on a computer. The view shifts to show a window with blinds, a glowing laptop screen, and a tripod-mounted camera as a man in a suit adjusts the equipment and another person sits nearby.
